chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-208 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 02.09.2025 Mr. Atteq-ur-Rehman Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
